SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common
Interface VolumeConstants

public interface VolumeConstants

Provides items to control the Volume, in a ResourceContainer.

Field Summary
static Action NORMAL_VOLUME
          Set volume to normal.
static Action TOGGLE_VOLUME
          Toggle volume between normal and previous adjusted value.
static Parameter VOLUME_CHANGE
          Determines the amount by which the volume is changed by the RTC actions VOLUME_UP and VOLUME_DOWN.
static Action VOLUME_DOWN
          Decrease volume by value of parameter VOLUME_CHANGE.
static Action VOLUME_UP
          Increase volume by value of parameter VOLUME_CHANGE.
 

Field Detail

VOLUME_CHANGE

static final Parameter VOLUME_CHANGE
Determines the amount by which the volume is changed by the RTC actions VOLUME_UP and VOLUME_DOWN. The value is an Integer expressing dB of change.
Default value is 3.

See Also:
VOLUME_UP, VOLUME_DOWN

VOLUME_UP

static final Action VOLUME_UP
Increase volume by value of parameter VOLUME_CHANGE. Note: The range of volume control is limited to [-12, +12].

VOLUME_DOWN

static final Action VOLUME_DOWN
Decrease volume by value of parameter VOLUME_CHANGE.

NORMAL_VOLUME

static final Action NORMAL_VOLUME
Set volume to normal.

TOGGLE_VOLUME

static final Action TOGGLE_VOLUME
Toggle volume between normal and previous adjusted value.
